message: fix: enable github pages during deploy

files.patch:
@@ -24,7 +24,9 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@v5
 
       - name: Configure GitHub Pages
-        uses: actions/configure-pages@v5
+        uses: actions/configure-pages@v6
+        with:
+          enablement: true
 
       - name: Setup Node
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
